name.value: ELZ - Serving XIS - Scenario 1 - Serving ELZ resources of van-XXX-Sanderink-de-Kok - target CheckContent - XML Format

description.value: Scenario 1 - Serving ELZ resources of van-XXX-Sanderink-de-Kok
OAuth Token for current patient
Resource.id for Composition 1
Resource.id for Task 1
Resource.id for ServiceRequest 1
Serve Task resource
Test server to serve Task resource.
Confirm that the operation was successful
Confirm that all Coding elements contain both a .system and a .code.
Confirm that the OID of the zib valueset is not used for the system of a coding element.

Confirm that all CodeableConcept elements contain either a coding.display or a text value if no Coding exists or has an extension (e.g. a nullFlavor or data-absent-reason extension). For more information see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3Use_of_coded_concepts.
Confirm that all References have a display value, see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3#Use_of_the_reference_datatype.

Confirm that all Identifiers have both a .system and a .value. In rare cases where a general category of identifiers can be used, .type can replace .system. Edge cases for both .system and .type to be unknown are not applicable to Nictiz. For more information, see https://www.hl7.org/fhir/stu3/datatypes.html#Identifier.
Check if the previous operation results in a FHIR Task that contains the values that are expected following Nictiz' materials (fixture .id: task-hg-VerwijzingHuisartsParamedicusMaximaalbericht)
Response contains exactly 1 Task
Task resource evaluated in the previous assert contains an .id
Contains .meta with .profile 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/hg-ReferralTask'
Contains .identifier with .system and .value
Contains .status 'in-progress'
Contains .intent 'order'
Contains .code with .coding with .system 'http://snomed.info/sct' and .code '3457005' and .display
Contains .focus with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .for with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .authoredOn
Contains .requester with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .owner with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Serve ServiceRequest resource
Test server to serve ServiceRequest resource.
Confirm that the operation was successful
Confirm that all Coding elements contain both a .system and a .code.
Confirm that the OID of the zib valueset is not used for the system of a coding element.

Confirm that all CodeableConcept elements contain either a coding.display or a text value if no Coding exists or has an extension (e.g. a nullFlavor or data-absent-reason extension). For more information see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3Use_of_coded_concepts.
Confirm that all References have a display value, see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3#Use_of_the_reference_datatype.

Confirm that all Identifiers have both a .system and a .value. In rare cases where a general category of identifiers can be used, .type can replace .system. Edge cases for both .system and .type to be unknown are not applicable to Nictiz. For more information, see https://www.hl7.org/fhir/stu3/datatypes.html#Identifier.

Check if the previous operation results in a FHIR ServiceRequest that contains the values that are expected following Nictiz' materials (fixture .id: servicerequest-hg-VerwijzingHuisartsParamedicusMaximaalbericht)
Response contains exactly 1 ServiceRequest
ServiceRequest resource evaluated in the previous assert contains an .id
Contains .meta with .profile 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/hg-ReferralServiceRequest'
Contains .identifier with .system and .value
Contains .status 'completed'
Contains .intent 'order'
Contains .category with .coding with .system 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.30.69' and .code '1' and .display
Contains .priority 'asap'
Contains .subject with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .authoredOn
Contains .requester with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .performer with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .supportingInfo with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Serve Composition resource with all the references by using the Document operation
Test server to serve Composition resource.
Confirm that the operation was successful
Confirm that all Coding elements contain both a .system and a .code.
Confirm that the OID of the zib valueset is not used for the system of a coding element.

Confirm that all CodeableConcept elements contain either a coding.display or a text value if no Coding exists or has an extension (e.g. a nullFlavor or data-absent-reason extension). For more information see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3Use_of_coded_concepts.
Confirm that all References have a display value, see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3#Use_of_the_reference_datatype.

Confirm that all Identifiers have both a .system and a .value. In rare cases where a general category of identifiers can be used, .type can replace .system. Edge cases for both .system and .type to be unknown are not applicable to Nictiz. For more information, see https://www.hl7.org/fhir/stu3/datatypes.html#Identifier.

Check if the previous operation results in a FHIR Composition that contains the values that are expected following Nictiz' materials (fixture .id: composition-hg-VerwijzingHuisartsParamedicusMaximaalbericht)
Response contains exactly 1 Composition
Composition resource evaluated in the previous assert contains an .id
Contains .meta with .profile 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/hg-ReferralComposition'
Contains .identifier with .system and .value
Contains .status 'final'
Contains .type with .coding with .system 'http://loinc.org' and .code '57133-1' and .display
Contains .subject with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .date
Contains .author with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .title with a value. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .section with .title with a value, and .code with .coding with .system 'http://snomed.info/sct' and .code '405624007' and .display, and , and. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Composition.where(id = '${composition-hg-VerwijzingHuisartsParamedicusMaximaalbericht-id}').section.where(title.hasValue() and code.coding.where(system = 'http://snomed.info/sct' and code = '405624007' and display).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .section.title with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .section.code with .coding with .system 'http://snomed.info/sct' and .code '405624007' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .section.section.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-TextValue' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .section.section.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-TextValue' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .section with .title with a value, and .code with .coding with .system 'http://snomed.info/sct' and .code '406550009' and .display. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Composition.where(id = '${composition-hg-VerwijzingHuisartsParamedicusMaximaalbericht-id}').section.where(title.hasValue() and code.coding.where(system = 'http://snomed.info/sct' and code = '406550009' and display).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .section.title with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .section.code with .coding with .system 'http://snomed.info/sct' and .code '406550009' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .section.section.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-TextValue' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .section.section.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-TextValue' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .section.section.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-TextValue' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .section.section.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-TextValue' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10-6 checks if all children are present in the same parent
